OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF SHANTEL MITCHELLS MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION, SET ONE (TRANSACTION ID # 210067769) FILED BY DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SHANTEL MITCHELL MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCS, SET ONE IS GRANTED, IN PART. [SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL AND COMPLETED DETAILS) PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS HEREBY DIRECTED TO PREPARE AN ORDER COMPELLING ADDITIONAL DOCUMENT PRODUCTION BY VW TO REQUEST NOS. 1-29, SAVE AND EXCEPT FOR NOS. 2, 23 AND 24. THE ORDER SHOULD INCLUDE LANGUAGE STRIKING VW'S INCLUSION OF THE PHRASE "[S]UBJECT TO AND WITHOUT WAIVING THE FOREGOING OBJECTIONS" IN ANY FURTHER RESPONSES, AS WELL AS REFERENCE TO PREMATURE EXPERT WITNESS DISCLOSURE AND THE CLAIM INFORMATION MAY BE EQUALLY AVAILABLE TO PLAINTIFF OR POSSESSED BY THIRD PARTIES. FURTHER, VW'S OBJECTION TO NATIONWIDE DISCOVERY INTO ALL 2019 JETTA VEHICLES (NOS. 30 AND 31) IS SUSTAINED, BUT IT IS OVERRULED WITH RESPECT TO THOSE SAME VEHICLES SOLD IN CALIFORNIA. IN PREPARING THAT ORDER, COUNSEL SHALL COMPLY WITH THE PROCEDURES AND APPROVALS SET FORTH IN RULES OF COURT 3.1312. ONCE APPROVED AS TO FORM, COUNSEL IS TO FORWARD THE PROPOSED ORDER TO PSW@HASSARD.COM FOR REVIEW AND EXECUTION. JUDGE PRO TEM: PHILIP WARD; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Docs, Set One
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Daniel Cox, Esq., QUILL & ARROW, LLP (310) 933-4271 dcox@quillarrowlaw.com Attorney for Plaintiff, SHANTEL MITCHELL
Andrew K. Stefatos, Esq., SQUIRE PATTON BOGGS (US) LLP +1 213.624.2500 andrew.stefatos@squirepb.com Attorney for Defendants Volkswagen Group of America, Inc. and
Dirito Brothers Walnut Creek dba Dirito Brothers Walnut Creek Volkswagen

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHANTEL MITCHELL Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Docs, Set One is GRANTED, in part. [SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL AND COMPLETED DETAILS)

Plaintiff's counsel is hereby directed to prepare an order compelling additional document production by VW to Request Nos. 1-29, save and except for Nos. 2, 23 and 24. The order should include language striking VW's inclusion of the phrase "[s]ubject to and without waiving the foregoing objections" in any further responses, as well as reference to premature expert witness disclosure and the claim information may be equally available to plaintiff or possessed by third parties. Further, VW's objection to nationwide discovery into all 2019 Jetta vehicles (Nos. 30 and 31) is SUSTAINED, but it is OVERRULED with respect to those same vehicles sold in California. In preparing that order, counsel shall comply with the procedures and approvals set forth in Rules of Court 3.1312. Once approved as to form, counsel is to forward the proposed order to psw@hassard.com for review and execution.

Judge Pro Tem: Philip Ward; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
